DISCOVERY, 302, AS TO PLAINTIFF SEQUOIA INSURANCE COMPANY'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO FORM INTERROGATORRIES, SET ONE; REQUEST FOR ORDER AWARDING MONETARY SANCTION AGAINST DEFENDANT DAX YEOPHANTONG CRAVEN, AND ATTORNEY'S FEES AND COSTS IN THE SUM OF $1,560.00, PLAINTIFF'S UNOPPOSED MOTION TO COMPEL IS GRANTED. MOVING PARTY HAS PROVIDED SUPPLEMENTAL PROOF OF SERVICE BY OVERNIGHT MAIL OF DELIVERY OF MOTION PAPERS. CODE COMPLAINT DISCOVERY SHALL BE SERVED WITHIN 20 DAYS OF THE DATE OF THIS ORDER. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED IN THE SUM OF $810.00 REPRESENTING FEES AND COSTS INCURRED IN THE PREPARATION AND FILING OF THE MOTION TO BE PAID ON THE SAME DATE AS SERVICE OF THE DISCOVERY RESPONSES. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE PRO TEM: STEVEN B. STEIN, CLERK: SEAN KANE, NOT REPORTED. (302/JPT)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-24-2015 Continued To Mar-01-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Form Interrogatorries, Set One; Request For Order Awarding Monetary Sanction Against Defendant Dax Yeophantong Craven, And Attorney'S Fees And Costs In The Sum Of $1,560.00
Off Calendar Oct-27-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. STEPHEN N. COLE, ESQ. of the Cole Law Firm, Tel No. 916-376-0486 appearing telephonically for Plaintiff Sequoia Insurance Company;
No other appearances made in this matter.

RULING - Plaintiff's counsel stipulates to the matter being heard by the judge pro tem. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. As to PLAINTIFF SEQUOIA INSURANCE COMPANY'S Motion To Compel Responses To Form Interrogatorries, Set One; Request For Order Awarding Monetary Sanction Against Defendant Dax Yeophantong Craven, And Attorney'S Fees And Costs In The Sum Of $1,560.00, Plaintiff's unopposed motion to compel is granted. Moving party has provided supplemental proof of service by overnight mail of delivery of motion papers. Code complaint discovery shall be served within 20 days of the date of this Order. Sanctions are awarded in the sum of $810.00 representing fees and costs incurred in the preparation and filing of the motion to be paid on the same date as service of the discovery responses. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge Pro Tem: Steven B. Stein, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/JPT)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-05-2015 Set For Order To Show Cause On Dec-01-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
